description: Phased fine-tune from baseline epoch-3000: Phase 1 (bias adapter, 15% of B) -> Phase 2 (MSC main, 50%) -> Phase 3 (leader-focused reward, 35%). Loaded by `finetune_phased.py --config <this file>`. CLI flags override anything here.
_phase_split_explanation: B is split as 15% / 50% / 35%. For B=400 -> phase epochs are 60 / 200 / 140.
_reserve_vram_gb_doc: Defensive 'occupy' tensor on a shared GPU to keep other users from squeezing onto the card. Capped automatically so the trainer always retains >= 8 GB. Set to a positive value via CLI when sharing the GPU with strangers (e.g. --reserve_vram_gb 12 on a 40GB A100). Default 0 because: (a) on a private 24GB 4090 we want to run 2 jobs of our own and the holder would starve the second one; (b) on a 40GB A100 we still want CLI-controlled holder rather than an implicit one.

param_name_mapping._doc: Mapping from spec semantic names to existing implementation keys, kept here for reproducibility.
param_name_mapping.leader_alpha / reward_scale: leader_gamma (train_ext.leader_reward.compute_leader_loss); mapped via alpha/20 in finetune_phased.py:map_alpha_to_gamma
param_name_mapping.leader_rampup_portion: implemented as a per-epoch callback that linearly ramps leader_gamma from 0 to map_alpha_to_gamma(leader_alpha) over rampup_portion * phase3_epochs
param_name_mapping.leader_stage_lr_drop: implemented as a linear LR decay across phase 3 from phase3_lr to phase3_final_lr (per-epoch callback)
param_name_mapping.bias_param_group_lr_multiplier: INFO-ONLY: current DistanceBiasModule has no learnable parameters; flag is logged but no extra param-group is created
param_name_mapping.leader_infinite_mode: INFO-ONLY: not implemented in train_ext.leader_reward; ignored at runtime
